title: viewport.getThumbnail request params
description: Request a low-frequency still thumbnail of the engine's external viewport. Optional maxWidth/maxHeight cap the returned image size; both may be omitted to let the engine pick. The image is a snapshot copy, never a reference into engine live memory.

maxWidth.description: Optional maximum width in pixels. The engine downscales to fit; alpha hard cap is 640.

maxHeight.description: Optional maximum height in pixels. The engine downscales to fit; alpha hard cap is 360.
